This is a password pool, including x entries. Each of the entry is of the <Password, Count, Popularity> form.
Note that, the term "Count" stands for the popular count of the corresponding password. For example, if the 
password "12345600" occurs 805 times in the entire 6 million CSDN dataset, we say the popular count of
password "12345600" is 805. Accordingly, the "Popularity" of password "12345600" is 805/(total count in 
the current pool=805/13790=0.0583756.
